backgrounds.label: Light Blue Diagonal Gradient
backgrounds.value: linear-gradient(to bottom right, hsl(var(--primary) / 0.05), transparent, hsl(var(--chart-2) / 0.05))

preview_examples.importYaml:
- type: syllabus
  section_id: syllabus-5hjjcl
  variant: program-modules
  program_title: AI Native Full Stack — Program Modules
  program_description: Build real AI-powered systems from day one. This curriculum is organized around two tracks — Core AI and Agents, and Infrastructure for AI — plus a capstone that integrates everything into a fully transformed, deployed company. Supported by complementary foundations in modern development tools and practices throughout.
  tech_logos:
    - name: Python
      icon: python
    - name: OpenAI
      icon: openai
    - name: n8n
      icon: n8n
    - name: Docker
      icon: docker
    - name: React
      icon: react
  module_cards:
    - title: Personal Assistants with OpenClaw
      duration: Core AI and Agents
      objectives:
        - Configure an open-source AI agent as a personal assistant
        - Assign tasks and integrate external applications with the agent
      projects: Deploy and configure a self-hosted AI assistant — yours, under your control, without relying on external vendors.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconRobot
    - title: Advanced Personal Assistants with OpenClaw
      duration: Core AI and Agents
      objectives:
        - Identify scenarios where an agent solves real business problems
        - Develop custom skills for OpenClaw
        - Implement contextual memory (episodic, semantic, procedural)
        - Advanced configuration and extension of the agent
      projects: Take your basic assistant agent to a productive tool with real autonomy in business contexts.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconRobot
    - title: Working with AI Coding Agents
      duration: Core AI and Agents
      objectives:
        - Build memory banks and context rules from an existing codebase
        - Write executable specifications for agents (agent specs)
        - Synthesize reusable skills so agents act with precision
      projects: Build memory banks and context rules that turn a coding agent into a collaborator that understands your codebase.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconCode
    - title: LLMs, Training & RAG
      duration: Core AI and Agents
      objectives:
        - Prepare data and select models for training
        - Implement RAG techniques on proprietary knowledge bases
        - Work with vector databases
        - Evaluate, debug, and integrate models in production
      projects: Implement RAG so your agent answers with proprietary, up-to-date knowledge.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconDatabase
    - title: Agentic Engineering
      duration: Core AI and Agents
      objectives:
        - Build agents with tool calling (real function calls)
        - Implement guardrails as a security and control mechanism
        - Provide tools to the agent via CLIs optimized for AI
        - Extend agent capabilities with the Model Context Protocol (MCP)
        - Give an agent persistent memory
      projects: Build agents that call tools, access external systems via MCPs and CLIs, and operate with persistent memory.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBolt
    - title: Agentic Workflows
      duration: Core AI and Agents
      objectives:
        - Design multi-agent systems with routing and arbitration
        - Implement shared memory across agents
        - Deploy agentic workflows with serverless and durable functions
      projects: Design systems where multiple agents collaborate, distribute tasks, and run autonomously at scale.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconLayoutKanban
    - title: Backend Development with Coding Agents
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Design backend architectures for AI-powered solutions
        - Create agent loops integrating LLMs with APIs
        - Implement lightweight storage and CSV data processing
        - Build and expose REST APIs for frontends and agents
      projects: Build robust APIs with FastAPI, implement agent loops in Python, and design backend architectures for AI use cases.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconServer
    - title: Workflow Automations
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Model business logic with workflow diagrams
        - Implement basic and advanced flows in n8n
        - Integrate LLMs and external apps in automations
        - Deploy maintainable workflows with error handling
      projects: Build AI-powered business automations in n8n that run autonomously without manual intervention.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconCode
    - title: Data Pipelines
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Manipulate and prepare datasets with Python
        - Build data pipelines from the application to analysis systems
      projects: Build pipelines that take raw data, transform it, and leave it ready to feed models, reports, or agents.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconChartBar
    - title: Telemetry
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Optimize storage for reporting and data integrity
        - Identify data collection opportunities in real scenarios
        - Collect telemetry and user context from the application
        - Build reports from telemetry data
      projects: Instrument applications to collect behavioral data and make decisions based on real evidence.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconChartBar
    - title: Asynchronous Processing and Offloading
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Implement background processing for costly tasks
        - Manage process queues with workers
        - Use queues to delegate work between agents and services
      projects: Implement background processing and queue systems that let agents delegate heavy work without blocking users.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconServer
    - title: Real-Time
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Build support chats with LLMs in real time
        - Implement response streaming with generators (yield)
        - Integrate webhooks and pub/sub in AI applications
      projects: Implement real-time communication between users and language models using streaming, WebSockets, and event-driven architectures.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBolt
    - title: Web Application Authentication
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Implement authentication and route restrictions in FastAPI
        - Build complete authentication flows (login, tokens, sessions)
      projects: Implement secure authentication in FastAPI and build complete login flows that define what each user — and agent — can do.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconCode
    - title: Error Handling, Debugging and Testing
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Understand and manage runtime errors with flow control
        - Develop test suites for robust applications
      projects: Verify AI-generated code with controlled error handling and test suites that validate expected behavior.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconCode
    - title: Cybersecurity in AI Applications
      duration: Infrastructure for AI
      objectives:
        - Identify and fix OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in web applications
        - Implement security practices specific to AI integrations
        - Use LLMs as a cybersecurity auditing tool
      projects: Identify critical vulnerabilities in AI applications and implement safe practices in model integration.
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconCode
    - title: AI-Transformed Company
      duration: Capstone
      objectives:
        - AI-generated frontend
        - API with full authentication
        - Telemetry and reporting pipeline
        - Agent-generated automated workflows
        - RAG knowledge layer
        - Agents with tool calling
        - Real-time communication
      projects: Integrate everything you have learned into a working, deployed system — a full transformation of a company through AI.
      orientation: horizontal
      icon: IconCode
  marginY:
    desktop: md none
  paddingY:
    desktop: md

- type: syllabus
  section_id: syllabus-l0x9pc
  variant: program-modules
  program_title: Full Stack with AI Program Overview
  program_description: Learn to build modern, production-ready web applications by mastering frontend and backend development alongside AI. Work with APIs, databases, and intelligent tools to design, develop, and ship real-world software.
  tech_logos:
    - name: HTML5
      icon: html
    - name: CSS3
      icon: css
    - name: JavaScript
      icon: javascript
    - name: React
      icon: react
    - name: Python
      icon: python
    - name: Git
      icon: git
  module_cards:
    - title: Introduction To HTML And CSS
      duration: Weeks 1-2
      objectives:
        - Create web structures with semantic HTML
        - Style pages with modern CSS techniques
        - Build visually appealing and accessible websites
      projects: Build responsive landing pages from scratch
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconCode
    - title: JavaScript
      duration: Weeks 3-5
      objectives:
        - Master variables, functions, and loops
        - DOM manipulation for interactive pages
        - Modern ES6+ features and async programming
      projects: Create dynamic, interactive web applications
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBrandJavascript
    - title: React
      duration: Weeks 6-9
      objectives:
        - Build component-based user interfaces
        - State management with hooks
        - Routing and best practices for scalable apps
      projects: Build modern single-page applications
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBrandReact
    - title: Python
      duration: Weeks 10-12
      objectives:
        - Core programming concepts and data structures
        - Object-oriented programming principles
        - Web development and automation skills
      projects: Create backend services and automation scripts
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconBrandPython
    - title: Creating APIs
      duration: Weeks 13-15
      objectives:
        - Design and build RESTful APIs
        - Authentication and database integration
        - API documentation and best practices
      projects: Build a full REST API with Flask/Express
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconApi
    - title: Agile Methodologies
      duration: Week 16
      objectives:
        - Scrum, Kanban, and agile frameworks
        - Sprint planning and daily standups
        - Effective collaboration in dev teams
      projects: Work in agile teams on group projects
      orientation: vertical
      icon: IconUsers
  paddingY:
    desktop: md
